arts.ttl: Arsenal and Manchester United chase Serie A top scorer
arts.sum: Arsenal have made contact with Atalanta over a potential deal to sign Mateo Retegui, with Manchester United also interested in the forward. Retegui has scored 20 goals in 22 league appearances for Atalanta this season, following his €28m move to the club from Genoa last summer. The Argentine-born Italy international is the leading scorer […] The post Arsenal and Manchester United chase Serie A top scorer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Man Utd as Maddison starts, Johnson and Odobert subs
arts.sum: Confirmed Tottenham XI: Vicario; Porro, Danso, Davies, Spence; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Kulusevski, Tel, Son. Ange Postecoglou has named his Tottenham Hotspur side to take on Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Barcelona transfer 'stance' emerges despite Aston Villa agreement with Man United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa from Manchester United

Paul Pogba has slammed Manchester United for their treatment of Cristiano Ronaldo, branding the ex-Red Devil as the best striker in history. “ Cristiano Ronaldo has never been the problem,” said Pogba, who is currently a free agent and has even been linked with a return to United when his doping ban expires next month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal thrash Tottenham in north London derby
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly makes her debut in a second spell with the Gunners as Arsenal thrash Spurs 5-0 in the north London derby at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Spurs vs Man Utd team news LIVE!
arts.sum: A Man Utd fan since birth, Jake gives his thoughts on their hopes for Sunday's game as well as United's season, Ruben Amorim and where Kobbie Mainoo will end up after his False 9 experiment last time out. arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp blasts Daniel Levy's 'lack of winning culture' and claims Tottenham's chairman is 'HAPPY' because of the smash success of his £1.2bn multi-use stadium... hours before fans' biggest ever protest
arts.sum: Redknapp believes a lack of 'winning culture' is to blame for the club's failures as Levy is satisfied with financial success off the pitch.

arts.ttl: Here we go! Man Utd 'make Osimhen offer' as 'DEAL CLOSE'
arts.sum: Osimhen has no shortage of suitors and reliable Turkish journalist Yagiz Sabuncuoglu claims that both Man Utd and PSG have made verbal contract offers for the striker ahead of the summer. Manchester United have made a verbal offer to Victor Osimhen, who is on the verge of making a career-defining move, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man United prepared to pay £62.5m for “top player” with 22 goals in 21 league games
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of Viktor Gyokeres from Sporting CP. The 26-year-old is one of the best strikers in the world, and he has scored 34 goals in all competitions this season. arts.sum: Manchester United are dealing with an extensive injury list as they head to the English capital to face Tottenham Hotspur
